name: UFO Taxi
short_description: Stranded on a futuristic Earth, you and your alien pals need cash to get home! Explore a vibrant 2.5D world, go on taxi missions or assist humans and UFOs alike in this casual platformer. Can you hustle your way to a stellar escape?
detailed_description:
A 2.5D casual platformer game where you play as an alien. You and your UFO buddies got stuck on Earth in 2067 and want to go home, but you'll need cash for those spaceship parts. How do you earn the money? It is up to you.

The Player has many activities to choose from

🚖 Taxi Missions: Drive passengers around the city, getting them from A to B as quickly as possible, while completing optional special requests for extra rewards.

👽 Special Side Quests: Help the citizens and fellow aliens with unique tasks: abduct bad guys, heal broken hearts or solve quirky mysteries!

🌍 Explore the World: Discover the city, its hidden underground, and a futuristic garbage dump. Search for collectibles like health upgrades, turbo boosts, and money... who knows what other surprises you’ll find?

⚠️ But watch out! The authorities are suspicious of your presence and are on the lookout for you!

This fun adventure takes between 1.5 - 4 hours to complete. Now with Xbox controller support!
